title: Belzephyr's Alt Weapons
description: Alternative swords for the main pack
body:
![Sword Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/135789939ee99e0e579bddcb7d4230aedab739e4_0.webp)

![Axe Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28ee9243f07b81d6f001aeae23c82ba0a8f87f88.png)

This pack is meant to provide interesting alternatives to the swords in Belzephyr' Stylized Textures while still feeling like the vanilla swords. Hopefully lending them to playing nice with other packs as well.

### Planned Features:
- Weapons **_(Incomplete)_**
- Specular Maps **_(Incomplete)_**
- Normal Maps **_(Incomplete)_**

### Link to base pack:

[Belzephyr's Stylized Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/belzephyrs-stylized-textures)
